## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The change keeps the project small and readable (no new runtime deps unless discussed).
- [ ] I tested locally in a browser (login, explorer, starting a session, terminal I/O).
- [ ] I updated the README / docs if user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] If this is a security-sensitive change, I've explicitly called it out below.
